scripts.release:package:internal: npm run build && node scripts/package_release.mjs --channel internal
scripts.release:package: npm run build && node scripts/package_release.mjs --channel public
scripts.assets:prepare:props: python scripts/prepare_prop_asset.py --input assets-source/art/props/prop_home_bedside_photo_v01_transparent.png --output public/assets/props/prop_home_bedside_photo_v01.png && python scripts/prepare_prop_asset.py --input assets-source/art/props/prop_home_red_thread_journal_v01_transparent.png --output public/assets/props/prop_home_red_thread_journal_v01.png && python scripts/prepare_prop_asset.py --input assets-source/art/props/prop_home_blue_key_bowl_v01_transparent.png --output public/assets/props/prop_home_blue_key_bowl_v01.png && python scripts/prepare_prop_asset.py --input assets-source/art/props/prop_home_glasses_case_v01_transparent.png --output public/assets/props/prop_home_glasses_case_v01.png
scripts.assets:prepare:home-furniture: python scripts/prepare_prop_asset.py --input assets-source/art/furniture/furniture_home_double_bed_v01_transparent.png --output public/assets/furniture/furniture_home_double_bed_v01.png --size 256 --padding 8 && python scripts/prepare_prop_asset.py --input assets-source/art/furniture/furniture_home_side_table_v01_transparent.png --output public/assets/furniture/furniture_home_side_table_v01.png --size 256 --padding 8 && python scripts/prepare_prop_asset.py --input assets-source/art/furniture/furniture_home_sofa_v01_transparent.png --output public/assets/furniture/furniture_home_sofa_v01.png --size 256 --padding 8 && python scripts/prepare_prop_asset.py --input assets-source/art/furniture/furniture_home_oval_table_v01_transparent.png --output public/assets/furniture/furniture_home_oval_table_v01.png --size 256 --padding 8 && python scripts/prepare_prop_asset.py --input assets-source/art/furniture/furniture_home_kitchen_counter_v01_transparent.png --output public/assets/furniture/furniture_home_kitchen_counter_v01.png --size 256 --padding 8 && python scripts/prepare_prop_asset.py --input assets-source/art/furniture/furniture_home_storage_cabinet_v01_transparent.png --output public/assets/furniture/furniture_home_storage_cabinet_v01.png --size 256 --padding 8 && python scripts/prepare_prop_asset.py --input assets-source/art/furniture/furniture_home_entry_console_v01_transparent.png --output public/assets/furniture/furniture_home_entry_console_v01.png --size 256 --padding 8
scripts.assets:render:environments: node scripts/render_svg_asset.mjs assets-source/art/environments/environment_home_v02.svg public/assets/environments/environment_home_v02.png 1280x720 && node scripts/render_svg_asset.mjs assets-source/art/environments/environment_rain_v01.svg public/assets/environments/environment_rain_v01.png 1280x720 && node scripts/render_svg_asset.mjs assets-source/art/environments/environment_life_v01.svg public/assets/environments/environment_life_v01.png 1280x720 && node scripts/render_svg_asset.mjs assets-source/art/environments/environment_return_v01.svg public/assets/environments/environment_return_v01.png 1280x720 && node scripts/render_svg_asset.mjs assets-source/art/environments/environment_ending_v01.svg public/assets/environments/environment_ending_v01.png 1280x720
